page.content: In the New Product Launch Pipeline, the overview details five products with varying sales performance, units sold, and projected growth. The first product, Chicken Nuggets, is set to launch in Q1 2024, with a sales volume of 1,200,000 units and a market share of 10%, projecting Year 1 sales of £15M, Year 2 sales of £22M, Year 3 sales of £30M, Year 4 sales of £38M, and Year 5 sales of £45M, resulting in a CAGR of 17.5%. The second product, Beef Jerky, launches in Q3 2024, with a sales volume of 900,000 units and an 8% market share, expecting Year 1 sales of £10M, Year 2 sales of £14M, Year 3 sales of £20M, Year 4 sales of £27M, and Year 5 sales of £33M, achieving a CAGR of 19.0%.

projected growth. The first product, Chicken Nuggets, is set to launch in Q1 2024, with a sales volume of 1,200,000 units and a

page.content: The third product, Plant-Based Sausages, is scheduled for Q2 2025, with a sales volume of 600,000 units, 5% market share, and Year 1 sales of £8M, Year 2 sales of £12M, Year 3 sales of £16M, Year 4 sales of £21M, and Year 5 sales of £25M, yielding a CAGR of 15.0%. Frozen Pizza will launch in Q4 2025, targeting 1,000,000 units sold, a 9% market share, Year 1 sales of £12M, Year 2 sales of £16M, Year 3 sales of £21M, Year 4 sales of £27M, and Year 5 sales of £34M, with a CAGR of 18.0%.

lines.text: The third product, Plant-Based Sausages, is scheduled for Q2 2025, with a sales volume of 600,000 units, 5% market share, and
Year 1 sales of £8M, Year 2 sales of £12M, Year 3 sales of £16M, Year 4 sales of £21M, and Year 5 sales of £25M, yielding a
CAGR of 15.0%. Frozen Pizza will launch in Q4 2025, targeting 1,000,000 units sold, a 9% market share, Year 1 sales of
£12M, Year 2 sales of £16M, Year 3 sales of £21M, Year 4 sales of £27M, and Year 5 sales of £34M, with a CAGR of 18.0%.

page.content: Lastly, Spicy Chicken Wings are projected to launch in Q1 2026, with a sales volume of 750,000 units, a 6% market share, Year 1 sales of £9M, Year 2 sales of £13M, Year 3 sales of £17M, Year 4 sales of £22M, and Year 5 sales of £28M, achieving a CAGR of 16.5%. Additionally, the same-store sales analysis shows a total sales figure of £150M, with a sales growth rate of 2.5%, market share at 15.4%, customer satisfaction at 85%, and an average ticket price of £25 across categories, including Quick Service with a 5-Year CAGR of 3.2%, Casual Dining at 2.5%, and Fine Dining at 1.8%.
